openedMessage: The cause page has been opened. Take action there if you can!
noMoreActions: No more actions available right now.
tryAnotherCategory: Try another category or browse all causes.
comeBackTomorrow: Come back tomorrow to keep your streak going.
streakMessage: You’ve done something good {count} days in a row.
supportCompletionText: This is a free service — if it helps you, please support me to cover server costs.
deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account and all personal data? This cannot be undone.
legalPrivacyIntro: TuWasGutes only processes data required to operate the app.
legalPrivacyDataList:
- technical server log data
- usage data for completed or skipped actions
- streak and progress data
- when signed in: name, email address and Google profile ID (stored encrypted)
- technical connection data for real-time updates
legalPrivacyUsage: The data is used solely to operate and improve TuWasGutes and is not shared with third parties.
legalPrivacyAnon: Without signing in, all data is stored locally in your browser only. When signed in, your streak and progress are stored server-side so you can continue across devices.
legalPrivacyContact: You can delete your account and all stored data at any time from within the app. Contact for privacy requests: cldilorenzo.cdl@gmail.com
legalExternalDisclaimer: TuWasGutes links to external websites and organizations. Their operators are solely responsible for their content, donation processes, and privacy practices.
legalExternalNoDonations: TuWasGutes does not collect donations itself.
notificationsNotSupported: Notifications not supported in this browser.
syncStreakHint: Sign in to save your streak across devices
monthlyCompletionCounter: You've done {count} good thing this month.
monthlyCompletionCounterPlural: You've done {count} good things this month.
